title: Subitem date notification for slack
excerpt: April 30, 2024 - Can we please add a slack notification automation for when a subitem date is approaching? Currently it is limited to the parent (Date & Timeline) and I need more specific item notifications. I appreciate…

posts.author: Strictly.bait (Jessica Banda)
posts.cookedHtml: April 30, 2024 - Can we please add a slack notification automation for when a subitem date is approaching? Currently it is limited to the parent (Date & Timeline) and I need more specific item notifications. I appreciate you monday team for all the hard work you’ve put into this platform!
